title: Board Updates Widget: Streamline the UI

posts.author: james_wooldridge (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The amount of real estate take up by each update is too much.
Ideally the display should show a line or two of the update text, plus the date etc. But the reply area, member details, likes, and white space are all taking up too much room.
With the widget set to about quarter of an HD screen, I’m lucky if one or two updates are visible.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d like to see a more concise list of the recent updates, with the ability to drill down to view and access more functionality.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello James,

If you’re open to apps, you could try Board Email Reports. It has a Last Updates automation rule that lets you get daily updates for any time period you choose.
